name: Belmont Hills The Golf Pro Shop
address: 47080 National Rd W, St Clairsville, OH 43950
about: Belmont Hills The Golf Pro Shop is a full-service golfing facility located at Belmont Hills Country Club in St. Clairsville, Ohio. It offers a comprehensive range of services including golf lessons, professional club fitting, and access to a state-of-the-art FlightScope golf simulator. The venue is part of a country club, providing an upscale environment for golfers looking to improve their game or play virtually. The Pro Shop carries a wide selection of equipment from top brands like Ping, Titleist, TaylorMade, and Callaway, with staff available to assist customers and special order items as needed. The facility caters to golfers of all skill levels, with a focus on personalized instruction and professional club fitting services to enhance performance on the course.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a state-of-the-art FlightScope simulator for year-round practice regardless of weather
Professional club fitting services using top-tier brands and advanced swing analysis technology
Personalized lessons from Head PGA Golf Pro, Ron Baker, tailored to all skill levels
Ability to play Belmont Hills' renowned golf course virtually with realistic course mapping
Comprehensive Pro Shop with a wide range of equipment and competitive pricing

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced FlightScope Golf Simulator used for lessons, club fitting, and virtual play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility provides club fitting services and has a Pro Shop with equipment available for purchase. While it's recommended to bring your own clubs for personalized fitting, rental clubs may be available upon inquiry.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No specific food or alcohol service is mentioned. It's best to contact the Pro Shop directly for their policy on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The content doesn't specify the exact time for 18 holes. Typical simulator rounds usually take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Belmont Hills offers PGA Junior Programs and has a dedicated PGA Junior Programs Coordinator, making it a family-friendly environment for young golfers.
